title: Cozy Smoky Italian Casserole
description: A hearty and comforting casserole filled with the flavors of Italy, featuring a crispy, smoky crust and a rich, cheesy center.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine crushed casabe, grated French, smoky, and cozy cheese.
In a separate bowl, mix together chopped parsley, garlic, olive oil, salt, and black pepper.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until well combined.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and top with additional grated French cheese.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 10 minutes before serving.
